expectations.evidence: Output states 'Workflow: Bug Fix — selected because the primary signal is a 500 HTTP error, not merely slow responses'
Step 1: System Analyzer — Diagnose Root Cause, delegated with subagent_type: system-analyzer

expectations.text: Root cause passed from Analyzer to Developer
expectations.evidence: Developer prompt contains full 'Context from Prior Agents' section with System Analyzer Root Cause (unbounded SELECT, missing index, DeadlineExceeded), Evidence (file:line references), and specific fix items
Step 3: QA designs 11 regression test cases (REG-CON-001 to REG-CON-011) with full test plan table

expectations.text: QA and Code Reviewer run in parallel at final step
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'QA + Code Reviewer (PARALLEL)' with 4a (QA E2E) and 4b (Code Reviewer) both shown together
